market: Will Mojtaba Khamenei be head of state in Iran end of 2026?
label: coordinated
rationale: sizeCV 0.03, 1.5h entry window, 20 fresh single-purpose wallets (history == {Mojtaba, Starmer-leader-out}) bound by a dense internal funding mesh -> collapses to n=1 actor (v1.9 s0.3). Evidentiary weight = ONE actor, not 20.

market: Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?
label: organic
rationale: sizeCV 0.66, entry spread ~125h (5d), established wallets -> independent participants converging on a view, not one operator. False-positive control: the sweep correctly did NOT flag this.

market: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates (near-term)?
label: organic
rationale: sizeCV 0.66, entry spread ~9h but varied sizes + established wallets -> event-driven burst around a scheduled Fed decision, organic. Second false-positive control.
